query:
SELECT DISTINCT a.name,
               am.metadata as "metadata?"
        FROM artifacts a
        LEFT JOIN artifact_metadata am ON am.artifact_id = a.id
        WHERE a.repository_id = $1
          AND a.is_deleted = false
          AND a.name ILIKE $2
          AND ($3::text IS NULL OR am.metadata #>> '{composer,type}' = $3)
        ORDER BY a.name
        LIMIT $4 OFFSET $5
